coupon.source_phrase_block: Discount code allows purchase of 50% off ferry tickets for up to four people. Code: HARBOR16 FOR NEEDHAM RESIDENTS ONLY Visit: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ Select date, departure, destination, and time. Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details. Enter library's code in the Coupon field and click apply. For more information, see this folder of resources: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1D_JeZy1VwWfKJOH48jvKlslF806UEraY
